ground_truth.title: How Artificial Intelligence is Shaping Video and Image Production for Creators
ground_truth.main_content: Artificial intelligence is no longer a futuristic idea. On the one hand, it is very important in the way content producers make videos and images today. With AI, creators are able to transform basic concepts into professionally-finished visuals within a fraction of the time it takes under traditional approaches. Since the creation of images using text prompts, as well as the seamless expansion of video clips, AI tools have become a must-have tool to creators of all profiles. The use of AI in content creation does not require a huge studio or a professional editor. Software such as ImagineX enables creators to test out new concepts and they do not require a lot of technical expertise. Text-to-video technology is one of the most revolutionary AI trends in the creation of content. This enables the creators to encode written scripts or descriptions into animated video content. Text-to-video applications break down written text and produces related images, such as effects of movement, background, and transitions, which are controlled through AI. The availability of a variety of AI models provides creators with the option to experiment in the visual identity of their content. The recent development in AI content creation is the affordability of powerful tools by individual creators and small businesses. AI tools of content creation are meant to increase creative liberty. Rather than restricting the content creators to the templates or strict workflows, AI enables production of dynamic and flexible content. Among the most prominent trends one can identify: AI video extensions, Image upscaling, Style transfer, AI based video editing, and Individual delivery. The AI-based collaboration saves the time devoted to revisions and approvals. AI is not a visual only tool, it also improves the narrative style itself. One of the current trends in digital content is personalization, and the AI provides this process more than ever before. Among the most feasible uses of AI in content creators is the mechanization of the repetitive tasks. Despite all the benefits of AI, its creators must take into account several challenges. The future of creating content will involve AI technology more and more. Video and image creation is being revolutionized by artificial AI to content creators.

The availability of a variety of AI models provides creators with the option to experiment in the visual identity of their content.
